title: Bid Elevator Pack 1 — Kitchen Gadgets Category
description: A series of bidding scenarios for a kitchen gadgets seller. Each scenario presents a keyword with current performance data and market context. The user must decide the optimal bid to maximize profitability while maintaining volume.

productContext.title: Premium Garlic Press - Stainless Steel Mincer with Easy Squeeze Handle

scenarios.reasoning: Current ACoS is 62.5% — far above the 25% target. With a $24.99 AOV and 8.3% CVR, your max profitable CPC = AOV × CVR × Target ACoS = $24.99 × 0.083 × 0.25 = $0.52. However, lowering too aggressively loses impression share. $0.65 balances profitability with maintaining rank in a high-competition keyword.

ACoS at 40.8% is above target but the term converts well (10.8% CVR). Max CPC = $24.99 × 0.108 × 0.25 = $0.67. Bidding $0.75 gives slight premium over max profitable bid to maintain position — acceptable since this high-CVR term generates consistent orders.

Already performing well at 23.7% ACoS — below the 25% target! With rising search volume and 13.5% CVR, this is a star keyword. Keep the current bid at $0.80 or even consider a slight increase to capture growing demand. Max CPC at this CVR = $24.99 × 0.135 × 0.25 = $0.84.

ACoS at 46% with declining search volume makes this a clear bid reduction case. CVR of 9.6% means max CPC = $24.99 × 0.096 × 0.25 = $0.60. With declining volume, there's no reason to bid above profitable levels. Drop to $0.55 to secure profitability.

This is a high-intent 'best' query with 23.3% ACoS — already below target! With 12% CVR, low competition, and rising search volume, this is an opportunity to bid UP. Max CPC = $24.99 × 0.12 × 0.25 = $0.75, but with room to profitably bid higher since current ACoS is below target. Increase to $0.90 to capture more of this valuable traffic.

Outstanding performance at 16.8% ACoS with 14.3% CVR! This niche term perfectly matches the product's 'easy squeeze' handle. Max CPC = $24.99 × 0.143 × 0.25 = $0.89. With low competition, you can safely bid up to $0.75-$0.85 to capture more of this highly converting traffic while staying well under your max profitable CPC.

ACoS at 31% is slightly above the 25% target. CVR of 11.6% means max CPC = $24.99 × 0.116 × 0.25 = $0.72. The term is close to profitable — a small reduction from $0.90 to $0.72 should bring it right to target. Phrase match gives you good control over when you appear.

Another star keyword at 19.7% ACoS with 12.2% CVR. Max CPC = $24.99 × 0.122 × 0.25 = $0.76. But since current ACoS is well below target and search volume is rising, you have room to bid up. $0.85 increases impression share while keeping ACoS near target. This is an exact match — every click counts.

ACoS at 25.6% — right at the target! 11.1% CVR and rising search volume (especially around holidays). Max CPC = $24.99 × 0.111 × 0.25 = $0.69. A small reduction to $0.70 keeps you at target ACoS while maintaining good position. This term has seasonal upside — monitor closely during Q4.

ACoS at 31.1% is above target. CVR of 11.6% means max CPC = $24.99 × 0.116 × 0.25 = $0.72. The 'easy clean' angle is a key differentiator for this product, so it's worth maintaining. Drop bid to $0.65 — slightly under max CPC — to bring ACoS to target while keeping the relevant traffic flowing.
